overall.description: A first-person handheld walk through a dark, overgrown trail and open grassy field at night. The footage captures movement through tall vegetation with minimal ambient light, showing natural rural surroundings including trees, grass, and wooden fence posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown nature trail with tall grass corridor

events.description: distant lights become visible through the darkness ahead, creating lens flare
camera view is completely obscured, screen goes black briefly

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark trail with tall grass lining the left side

entered.detail: tall reeds and grass stalks lining the left side of the path, illuminated by camera light
dense dark bushes and vegetation on the right side of the trail
faint glowing lights visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, overgrown trail at night. Tall grass lines the left side while dense foliage borders the right. Distant lights become visible ahead before the view is briefly obscured by a blackout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy field with scattered trees and fence line

events.description: emerges from blackout into open field with large tree immediately visible on the right
wooden fence posts become visible on the right side marking a boundary

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the open grassy field, passing by a large tree on the right side

entered.detail: mature tree with thick trunk and leafy branches prominently visible on the right
open area covered with tall grass extending into the darkness
weathered wooden posts marking a boundary line on the right side
dark silhouette of trees forming the horizon in the distance

segments.scene_description: After a brief blackout, the scene opens into a wide grassy field at night. A large tree dominates the right side of the frame as the camera moves forward. Wooden fence posts appear midway through, marking a boundary in the open terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a claustrophobic, overgrown trail into a wide, open field under the cover of night. It begins by pushing through a narrow path flanked by tall grass and dense foliage, moving toward distant, flickering lights. As the view is momentarily obscured by a blackout, the camera emerges from the brush into an expansive grassy landscape. The scene then opens up to reveal a large, dominating tree on the right as the movement continues forward. Finally, the camera passes a series of wooden fence posts that mark a boundary across the dark, open terrain.
